cslrnp_sql_trx_notposted.name: fin_finacc_transaction
cslrnp_sql_trx_notposted.script: insert into cslrnp_data_notposted( cslrnp_data_notposted_id, ad_org_id, created, createdby, updated, updatedby, isactive, ad_client_id, documentno, dateacct, tablename, cbpid , grandtotal, description, documentno2, tab_id, docbasetype , record_id , processid ) select get_uuid() as recordid ,ad_org_id,now() as created , to_char('100') as createdby, now() as updated, to_char('100') as updatedby, to_char('Y') as isactive ,ad_client_id, 'Line: ' || to_char(line) AS DOCUMENTNO, dateacct, 'FIN_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT' as tablename, fin_financial_account_id as id, depositamt-paymentamt as GRANDTOTAL, to_char(description) as description, coalesce(to_char((select printname from c_doctype_trl where c_doctype_id=(select min(c_doctype_id) from c_doctype where ad_client_id=to_char(':pclient') and docbasetype='FAT') and ad_language=to_char(':plang') and ad_client_id=to_char(':pclient'))), 'Financial Account Transaction') as document, '23691259D1BD4496BCC5F32645BCA4B9' as tab_id, 'FAT' as docbasetype, fin_finacc_transaction_id as record_id ,to_char(':process') as process from fin_finacc_transaction where processed = 'Y' and COALESCE(posted,'') NOT IN ('Y','D') and 'Y'=(select max(isactive) from c_acctschema_table where ad_table_id='4D8C3B3C31D1410DA046140C9F024D17' and ad_client_id=to_char(':pclient'))

cslrnp_sql_trx_notposted.name: c_Settlement
cslrnp_sql_trx_notposted.script: insert into cslrnp_data_notposted( cslrnp_data_notposted_id, ad_org_id, created, createdby, updated, updatedby, isactive, ad_client_id, documentno, dateacct, tablename, cbpid , grandtotal, description, documentno2, tab_id, docbasetype , record_id , processid ) select get_uuid() as recordid ,ad_org_id,now() as created , to_char('100') as createdby, now() as updated, to_char('100') as updatedby, to_char('Y') as isactive ,ad_client_id, TO_CHAR(documentno) AS DOCUMENTNO, dateacct, 'C_Settlement' as tablename, C_Settlement_id as id, generatedamt, to_char(description) as description, coalesce(to_char((select printname from c_doctype_trl where c_doctype_id=c_Settlement.c_doctype_id and ad_language=to_char(':plang') and ad_client_id=to_char(':pclient'))), 'Settlements') as document, '800025' as tab_id, 'STT' as docbasetype, c_Settlement_id as record_id ,to_char(':process') as process from c_Settlement where processed = 'Y' and COALESCE(posted,'') NOT IN ('Y','D') and settlementtype <> 'I' and 'Y'=(select max(isactive) from c_acctschema_table where ad_table_id='800019' and ad_client_id=to_char(':pclient'))

cslrnp_sql_trx_notposted.name: m_inventory
cslrnp_sql_trx_notposted.script: insert into cslrnp_data_notposted( cslrnp_data_notposted_id, ad_org_id, created, createdby, updated, updatedby, isactive, ad_client_id, documentno, dateacct, tablename, cbpid , grandtotal, description, documentno2, tab_id, docbasetype , record_id , processid ) select get_uuid() as recordid ,ad_org_id,now() as created , to_char('100') as createdby, now() as updated, to_char('100') as updatedby, to_char('Y') as isactive ,ad_client_id, TO_CHAR(name) AS DOCUMENTNO, movementdate , 'M_INVENTORY' as tablename, m_inventory_id as id, 0 as GRANDTOTAL, to_char(description) as description, coalesce(to_char((select printname from c_doctype_trl where c_doctype_id=(select min(c_doctype_id) from c_doctype where ad_client_id=to_char(':pclient') and docbasetype='MMI') and ad_language=to_char(':plang') and ad_client_id=to_char(':pclient'))), 'Physical Inventory') as document, '255' as tab_id, 'MMI' as docbasetype, m_inventory_id as record_id ,to_char(':process') as process from m_inventory where processed = 'Y' and COALESCE(posted,'') NOT IN ('Y','D') and 'Y'=(select max(isactive) from c_acctschema_table where ad_table_id='321' and ad_client_id=to_char(':pclient'))

cslrnp_sql_trx_notposted.name: GL_Journal
cslrnp_sql_trx_notposted.script: insert into cslrnp_data_notposted( cslrnp_data_notposted_id, ad_org_id, created, createdby, updated, updatedby, isactive, ad_client_id, documentno, dateacct, tablename, cbpid , grandtotal, description, documentno2, tab_id, docbasetype , record_id , processid ) select get_uuid() as recordid ,ad_org_id,now() as created , to_char('100') as createdby, now() as updated, to_char('100') as updatedby, to_char('Y') as isactive ,ad_client_id, TO_CHAR(documentno) AS DOCUMENTNO, dateacct, 'GL_Journal' as tablename, GL_Journal_id as id, totaldr, to_char(description) as description, coalesce(to_char((select printname from c_doctype_trl where c_doctype_id=GL_Journal.c_doctype_id and ad_language=to_char(':plang') and ad_client_id=to_char(':pclient'))), 'GL Journal') as document, '160' as tab_id, (select docbasetype from c_doctype where c_doctype_id=GL_Journal.c_doctype_id) as docbasetype, GL_Journal_id as record_id ,to_char(':process') as process from GL_Journal where processed = 'Y' and COALESCE(posted,'') NOT IN ('Y','D') and 'Y'=(select max(isactive) from c_acctschema_table where ad_table_id='224' and ad_client_id=to_char(':pclient'))

cslrnp_sql_trx_notposted.name: FIN_Doubtful_Debt
cslrnp_sql_trx_notposted.script: insert into cslrnp_data_notposted( cslrnp_data_notposted_id, ad_org_id, created, createdby, updated, updatedby, isactive, ad_client_id, documentno, dateacct, tablename, cbpid , grandtotal, description, documentno2, tab_id, docbasetype , record_id , processid ) select get_uuid() as recordid ,ad_org_id,now() as created , to_char('100') as createdby, now() as updated, to_char('100') as updatedby, to_char('Y') as isactive ,ad_client_id, TO_CHAR(documentno) AS DOCUMENTNO, dateacct, 'FIN_Doubtful_Debt' as tablename, FIN_Doubtful_Debt_id as id, (amount) as grandtotal, to_char(description) as description, coalesce(to_char((select printname from c_doctype_trl where c_doctype_id=(select min(c_doctype_id) from c_doctype where ad_client_id=to_char(':pclient') and docbasetype='LQF') and ad_language=to_char(':plang') and ad_client_id=to_char(':pclient'))), 'Dudoso Cobro') as document, '9D859A2A50F44562AFA21AAF2DF91B8A' as tab_id, 'LQF' as docbasetype, FIN_Doubtful_Debt_id as record_id ,to_char(':process') as process from FIN_Doubtful_Debt where processed = 'Y' and COALESCE(posted,'') NOT IN ('Y','D') and 'Y'=(select max(isactive) from c_acctschema_table where ad_table_id='30721072789F410E9606D2235CB2A226' and ad_client_id=to_char(':pclient'))

cslrnp_sql_trx_notposted.name: m_movement
cslrnp_sql_trx_notposted.script: insert into cslrnp_data_notposted( cslrnp_data_notposted_id, ad_org_id, created, createdby, updated, updatedby, isactive, ad_client_id, documentno, dateacct, tablename, cbpid , grandtotal, description, documentno2, tab_id, docbasetype , record_id , processid ) select get_uuid() as recordid ,ad_org_id,now() as created , to_char('100') as createdby, now() as updated, to_char('100') as updatedby, to_char('Y') as isactive ,ad_client_id, TO_CHAR(name) AS DOCUMENTNO, movementdate , 'M_MOVEMENT' as tablename, m_movement_id as id, 0 as GRANDTOTAL, to_char(description) as description, coalesce(to_char((select printname from c_doctype_trl where c_doctype_id=(select min(c_doctype_id) from c_doctype where ad_client_id=to_char(':pclient') and docbasetype='MMM') and ad_language=to_char(':plang') and ad_client_id=to_char(':pclient'))), 'Goods Movement') as document, '259' as tab_id, 'MMM' as docbasetype, m_movement_id as record_id ,to_char(':process') as process from m_movement where processed = 'Y' and COALESCE(posted,'') NOT IN ('Y','D') and 'Y'=(select max(isactive) from c_acctschema_table where ad_table_id='323' and ad_client_id=to_char(':pclient'))

cslrnp_sql_trx_notposted.name: sswh_withh_card_credit
cslrnp_sql_trx_notposted.script: insert into cslrnp_data_notposted( cslrnp_data_notposted_id, ad_org_id, created, createdby, updated, updatedby, isactive, ad_client_id, documentno, dateacct, tablename, cbpid , grandtotal, description, documentno2, tab_id, docbasetype , record_id , processid ) select get_uuid() as recordid ,ad_org_id,now() as created , to_char('100') as createdby, now() as updated, to_char('100') as updatedby, to_char('Y') as isactive ,ad_client_id, TO_CHAR(documentno) AS DOCUMENTNO, dateacct, 'sswh_withh_card_credit' as tablename, sswh_withh_card_credit_id as id, (withh_vat + withh_rent) as grandtotal, to_char(description) as description, coalesce(to_char((select printname from c_doctype_trl where c_doctype_id=(select min(c_doctype_id) from c_doctype where ad_client_id=to_char(':pclient') and docbasetype='WHC') and ad_language=to_char(':plang') and ad_client_id=to_char(':pclient'))), 'Retencion Tarjetas') as document, '26723DEBE7BA4570ADF0AE5C2D3846DC' as tab_id, 'WHC' as docbasetype, sswh_withh_card_credit_id as record_id ,to_char(':process') as process from sswh_withh_card_credit where processed = 'Y' and COALESCE(posted,'') NOT IN ('Y','D') and 'Y'=(select max(isactive) from c_acctschema_table where ad_table_id='610D781C7DE142108BDBBBF84107C394' and ad_client_id=to_char(':pclient'))

cslrnp_sql_trx_notposted.name: SSPICS_Sale_Bid
cslrnp_sql_trx_notposted.script: insert into cslrnp_data_notposted( cslrnp_data_notposted_id, ad_org_id, created, createdby, updated, updatedby, isactive, ad_client_id, documentno, dateacct, tablename, cbpid , grandtotal, description, documentno2, tab_id, docbasetype , record_id , processid ) select get_uuid() as recordid ,ad_org_id,now() as created , to_char('100') as createdby, now() as updated, to_char('100') as updatedby, to_char('Y') as isactive ,ad_client_id, TO_CHAR(documentno) AS DOCUMENTNO, date_process, 'SSPICS_Sale_Bid' as tablename, SSPICS_Sale_Bid_id as id, (total_portfolio) as grandtotal, to_char(description) as description, coalesce(to_char((select printname from c_doctype_trl where c_doctype_id=(select min(c_doctype_id) from c_doctype where ad_client_id=to_char(':pclient') and docbasetype='LVC') and ad_language=to_char(':plang') and ad_client_id=to_char(':pclient'))), 'Licitación Venta de Cartera') as document, '48BB8E9411714CAA8950BD9BA713ED73' as tab_id, 'LVC' as docbasetype, SSPICS_Sale_Bid_id as record_id ,to_char(':process') as process from SSPICS_Sale_Bid where processed = 'Y' and COALESCE(posted,'') NOT IN ('Y','D') and 'Y'=(select max(isactive) from c_acctschema_table where ad_table_id='552B3617C181420EA04AA76A0452D806' and ad_client_id=to_char(':pclient'))

cslrnp_sql_trx_notposted.name: m_inout so trx
cslrnp_sql_trx_notposted.script: insert into cslrnp_data_notposted( cslrnp_data_notposted_id, ad_org_id, created, createdby, updated, updatedby, isactive, ad_client_id, documentno, dateacct, tablename, cbpid , grandtotal, description, documentno2, tab_id, docbasetype , record_id , processid ) select get_uuid() as recordid ,ad_org_id,now() as created , to_char('100') as createdby, now() as updated, to_char('100') as updatedby, to_char('Y') as isactive ,ad_client_id, TO_CHAR(documentno) AS DOCUMENTNO, dateacct, 'M_InOut' as tablename, m_inout_id as id, 0 as GRANDTOTAL, to_char(description) as description, coalesce(to_char((select printname from c_doctype_trl where c_doctype_id=m_inout.c_doctype_id and ad_language=to_char(':plang') and ad_client_id=to_char(':pclient'))), 'Goods Shipments') as document, '257' as tab_id, (select docbasetype from c_doctype where c_doctype_id=m_inout.c_doctype_id) as docbasetype, m_inout_id as record_id ,to_char(':process') from m_inout where processed = 'Y' and COALESCE(posted,'') NOT IN ('Y','D') and issotrx = 'Y' and 'Y'=(select max(isactive) from c_acctschema_table where ad_table_id='319' and ad_client_id=to_char(':pclient') )

cslrnp_sql_trx_notposted.name: SSPR_Payroll
cslrnp_sql_trx_notposted.script: insert into cslrnp_data_notposted( cslrnp_data_notposted_id, ad_org_id, created, createdby, updated, updatedby, isactive, ad_client_id, documentno, dateacct, tablename, cbpid , grandtotal, description, documentno2, tab_id, docbasetype , record_id , processid ) select get_uuid() as recordid ,ad_org_id,now() as created , to_char('100') as createdby, now() as updated, to_char('100') as updatedby, to_char('Y') as isactive ,ad_client_id, 'Line: ' || to_char(documentno) AS DOCUMENTNO, datedoc, 'SSPR_Payroll' as tablename, SSPR_Payroll_id as id, 0.00 as GRANDTOTAL, to_char(description) as description, coalesce(to_char((select printname from c_doctype_trl where c_doctype_id=(select min(c_doctype_id) from c_doctype where ad_client_id=to_char(':pclient') and docbasetype='NOM') and ad_language=to_char(':plang') and ad_client_id=to_char(':pclient'))), 'Nomina') as document, '746B6484EF2F4B7F9F4733CFE9638C41' as tab_id, 'NOM' as docbasetype, SSPR_Payroll_id as record_id ,to_char(':process') as process from SSPR_Payroll where processed = 'Y' and COALESCE(posted,'') NOT IN ('Y','D') and 'Y'=(select max(isactive) from c_acctschema_table where ad_table_id='BCEEDEC4FE2B4B3FAEA32084BB88AD95' and ad_client_id=to_char(':pclient'))

cslrnp_sql_trx_notposted.name: C_Cash
cslrnp_sql_trx_notposted.script: insert into cslrnp_data_notposted( cslrnp_data_notposted_id, ad_org_id, created, createdby, updated, updatedby, isactive, ad_client_id, documentno, dateacct, tablename, cbpid , grandtotal, description, documentno2, tab_id, docbasetype , record_id , processid ) select get_uuid() as recordid ,ad_org_id,now() as created , to_char('100') as createdby, now() as updated, to_char('100') as updatedby, to_char('Y') as isactive ,ad_client_id, TO_CHAR(name) AS DOCUMENTNO, dateacct, 'C_Cash' as tablename, C_Cash_id as id, c_cash.STATEMENTDIFFERENCE, to_char(description) as description, coalesce(to_char((select printname from c_doctype_trl where c_doctype_id=(select min(c_doctype_id) from c_doctype where ad_client_id=to_char(':pclient') and docbasetype='CMC') and ad_language=to_char(':plang') and ad_client_id=to_char(':pclient'))), 'Cash Journal') as document, '338' as tab_id, 'CMC' as docbasetype, c_cash_id as record_id ,to_char(':process') as process from C_Cash where processed = 'Y' and COALESCE(posted,'') NOT IN ('Y','D') and 'Y'=(select max(isactive) from c_acctschema_table where ad_table_id='407' and ad_client_id=to_char(':pclient'))

cslrnp_sql_trx_notposted.name: c_bankstatement
cslrnp_sql_trx_notposted.script: insert into cslrnp_data_notposted( cslrnp_data_notposted_id, ad_org_id, created, createdby, updated, updatedby, isactive, ad_client_id, documentno, dateacct, tablename, cbpid , grandtotal, description, documentno2, tab_id, docbasetype , record_id , processid ) select get_uuid() as recordid ,ad_org_id,now() as created , to_char('100') as createdby, now() as updated, to_char('100') as updatedby, to_char('Y') as isactive ,ad_client_id, TO_CHAR(name) AS DOCUMENTNO, statementdate, 'C_Bankstatement' as tablename, C_bankstatement_id as id, STATEMENTDIFFERENCE, to_char(description) as description, coalesce(to_char((select printname from c_doctype_trl where c_doctype_id=(select min(c_doctype_id) from c_doctype where ad_client_id=to_char(':pclient') and docbasetype='CMB') and ad_language=to_char(':plang') and ad_client_id=to_char(':pclient'))), 'Bank Statements') as document, '328' as tab_id, 'CMB' as docbasetype, c_bankstatement_id as record_id ,to_char(':process') as process from c_bankstatement where processed = 'Y' and COALESCE(posted,'') NOT IN ('Y','D') and 'Y'=(select max(isactive) from c_acctschema_table where ad_table_id='392' and ad_client_id=to_char(':pclient'))

cslrnp_sql_trx_notposted.name: SSWS_WithholdingSale
cslrnp_sql_trx_notposted.script: insert into cslrnp_data_notposted( cslrnp_data_notposted_id, ad_org_id, created, createdby, updated, updatedby, isactive, ad_client_id, documentno, dateacct, tablename, cbpid , grandtotal, description, documentno2, tab_id, docbasetype , record_id , processid ) select get_uuid() as recordid ,ad_org_id,now() as created , to_char('100') as createdby, now() as updated, to_char('100') as updatedby, to_char('Y') as isactive ,ad_client_id, TO_CHAR(documentno) AS DOCUMENTNO, dateacct, 'SSWS_WithholdingSale' as tablename, SSWS_WithholdingSale_id as id, (totalwhrentalamttmp+totalwhivaamttmp) as grandtotal, to_char(description) as description, coalesce(to_char((select printname from c_doctype_trl where c_doctype_id=(select min(c_doctype_id) from c_doctype where ad_client_id=to_char(':pclient') and docbasetype='LQF') and ad_language=to_char(':plang') and ad_client_id=to_char(':pclient'))), 'Comprobante de Retención') as document, '81C6304D07B04F7692B57D4BCB6B3CDE' as tab_id, 'LQF' as docbasetype, SSWS_WithholdingSale_id as record_id ,to_char(':process') as process from SSWS_WithholdingSale where processed = 'Y' and COALESCE(posted,'') NOT IN ('Y','D') and 'Y'=(select max(isactive) from c_acctschema_table where ad_table_id='211492B753264EAEBE328BA4FED1F066' and ad_client_id=to_char(':pclient'))

cslrnp_sql_trx_notposted.name: fin_reconciliation
cslrnp_sql_trx_notposted.script: insert into cslrnp_data_notposted( cslrnp_data_notposted_id, ad_org_id, created, createdby, updated, updatedby, isactive, ad_client_id, documentno, dateacct, tablename, cbpid , grandtotal, description, documentno2, tab_id, docbasetype , record_id , processid ) select get_uuid() as recordid ,ad_org_id,now() as created , to_char('100') as createdby, now() as updated, to_char('100') as updatedby, to_char('Y') as isactive ,ad_client_id, TO_CHAR(documentno) AS DOCUMENTNO, statementdate, 'FIN_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT' as talename, fin_financial_account_id as id, endingbalance - startingbalance as GRANDTOTAL, '' as description, coalesce(to_char((select printname from c_doctype_trl where c_doctype_id=(select min(c_doctype_id) from c_doctype where ad_client_id=to_char(':pclient') and docbasetype='REC') and ad_language=to_char(':plang') and ad_client_id=to_char(':pclient'))), 'RECONCILIATION') as document, 'C095D2CC39704DBE8B906B7CD7710968' as tab_id, 'REC' as docbasetype, fin_reconciliation_id as record_id ,to_char(':process') as process from fin_reconciliation where processed = 'Y' and COALESCE(posted,'') NOT IN ('Y','D') and 'Y'=(select max(isactive) from c_acctschema_table where ad_table_id='B1B7075C46934F0A9FD4C4D0F1457B42' and ad_client_id=to_char(':pclient'))

cslrnp_sql_trx_notposted.name: fin_payment receipt
cslrnp_sql_trx_notposted.script: insert into cslrnp_data_notposted( cslrnp_data_notposted_id, ad_org_id, created, createdby, updated, updatedby, isactive, ad_client_id, documentno, dateacct, tablename, cbpid , grandtotal, description, documentno2, tab_id, docbasetype , record_id , processid ) select get_uuid() as recordid ,ad_org_id,now() as created , to_char('100') as createdby, now() as updated, to_char('100') as updatedby, to_char('Y') as isactive ,ad_client_id, TO_CHAR(documentno) AS DOCUMENTNO, paymentdate , 'C_Bpartner' as tablename, c_bpartner_id as id, amount as GRANDTOTAL, to_char(description) as description, coalesce(to_char((select printname from c_doctype_trl where c_doctype_id=(select min(c_doctype_id) from c_doctype where ad_client_id=to_char(':pclient') and docbasetype='ARR') and ad_language=to_char(':plang') and ad_client_id=to_char(':pclient'))), 'Payment In') as document, 'C4B6506838E14A349D6717D6856F1B56' as tab_id, 'ARR' as docbasetype, fin_payment_id as record_id ,to_char(':process') as process from fin_payment where processed = 'Y' and COALESCE(posted,'') NOT IN ('Y','D') and isreceipt='Y' and status <> 'RPVOID' and 'Y'=(select max(isactive) from c_acctschema_table where ad_table_id='D1A97202E832470285C9B1EB026D54E2' and ad_client_id=to_char(':pclient'))

cslrnp_sql_trx_notposted.name: c_invoice not so trx
cslrnp_sql_trx_notposted.script: insert into cslrnp_data_notposted( cslrnp_data_notposted_id, ad_org_id, created, createdby, updated, updatedby, isactive, ad_client_id, documentno, dateacct, tablename, cbpid , grandtotal, description, documentno2, tab_id, docbasetype , record_id , processid ) select get_uuid() as recordid ,ad_org_id,now() as created , to_char('100') as createdby, now() as updated, to_char('100') as updatedby, to_char('Y') as isactive ,ad_client_id, TO_CHAR(documentno) AS DOCUMENTNO, dateacct, 'C_Bpartner' as tablename, C_bpartner_id as id, GRANDTOTAL, to_char(description) as description, coalesce(to_char((select printname from c_doctype_trl where c_doctype_id=c_invoice.c_doctype_id and ad_language=to_char(':plang') and ad_client_id=to_char(':pclient'))), 'Purchase Invoices') as document, '290' as tab_id, (select docbasetype from c_doctype where c_doctype_id=c_invoice.c_doctype_id) as docbasetype, c_invoice_id as record_id ,to_char(':process') from c_invoice where processed = 'Y' and COALESCE(posted,'') NOT IN ('Y','D') and issotrx = 'N' and docstatus <> 'VO' and 'Y'=(select max(isactive) from c_acctschema_table where ad_table_id='318' and ad_client_id=to_char(':pclient'))

cslrnp_sql_trx_notposted.name: c_invoice so trx
cslrnp_sql_trx_notposted.script: insert into cslrnp_data_notposted( cslrnp_data_notposted_id, ad_org_id, created, createdby, updated, updatedby, isactive, ad_client_id, documentno, dateacct, tablename, cbpid , grandtotal, description, documentno2, tab_id, docbasetype , record_id , processid ) select get_uuid() as recordid ,ad_org_id,now() as created , to_char('100') as createdby, now() as updated, to_char('100') as updatedby, to_char('Y') as isactive ,ad_client_id, TO_CHAR(documentno) AS DOCUMENTNO, dateacct, 'C_Bpartner' as tablename, C_bpartner_id as id, GRANDTOTAL, to_char(description) as description, coalesce(to_char((select printname from c_doctype_trl where c_doctype_id=c_invoice.c_doctype_id and ad_language=to_char(':plang') and ad_client_id=to_char(':pclient'))), 'Sales Invoices') as document, '263' as tab_id, (select docbasetype from c_doctype where c_doctype_id=c_invoice.c_doctype_id) as docbasetype, c_invoice_id as record_id ,to_char(':process') from c_invoice where processed = 'Y' and COALESCE(posted,'') NOT IN ('Y','D') and issotrx = 'Y' and docstatus <> 'VO' and 'Y'=(select max(isactive) from c_acctschema_table where ad_table_id='318' and ad_client_id=to_char(':pclient') )

cslrnp_sql_trx_notposted.name: A_Amortization
cslrnp_sql_trx_notposted.script: insert into cslrnp_data_notposted( cslrnp_data_notposted_id, ad_org_id, created, createdby, updated, updatedby, isactive, ad_client_id, documentno, dateacct, tablename, cbpid , grandtotal, description, documentno2, tab_id, docbasetype , record_id , processid ) select get_uuid() as recordid ,ad_org_id,now() as created , to_char('100') as createdby, now() as updated, to_char('100') as updatedby, to_char('Y') as isactive ,ad_client_id, TO_CHAR(documentno) AS DOCUMENTNO, dateacct, 'A_Amortization' as tablename, A_Amortization_id as id, (totalamortization) as grandtotal, to_char(description) as description, coalesce(to_char((select printname from c_doctype_trl where c_doctype_id=(select min(c_doctype_id) from c_doctype where ad_client_id=to_char(':pclient') and docbasetype='AMZ') and ad_language=to_char(':plang') and ad_client_id=to_char(':pclient'))), 'Amortizacion') as document, '800076' as tab_id, 'AMZ' as docbasetype, A_Amortization_id as record_id ,to_char(':process') as process from A_Amortization where processed = 'Y' and COALESCE(posted,'') NOT IN ('Y','D') and 'Y'=(select max(isactive) from c_acctschema_table where ad_table_id='800060' and ad_client_id=to_char(':pclient'))

cslrnp_sql_trx_notposted.name: FIN_BankStatement
cslrnp_sql_trx_notposted.script: Insert into cslrnp_data_notposted( cslrnp_data_notposted_id, ad_org_id, created, createdby, updated, updatedby, isactive, ad_client_id, documentno, dateacct, tablename, cbpid , grandtotal, description, documentno2, tab_id, docbasetype , record_id , processid ) select get_uuid() as recordid ,ad_org_id,now() as created , to_char('100') as createdby, now() as updated, to_char('100') as updatedby, to_char('Y') as isactive ,ad_client_id, TO_CHAR(documentno) AS DOCUMENTNO, statementdate, 'SSWS_WithholdingSale' as tablename, FIN_BankStatement_id as id, (0.00) as grandtotal, to_char(filename) as description, coalesce(to_char((select printname from c_doctype_trl where c_doctype_id=(select min(c_doctype_id) from c_doctype where ad_client_id=to_char(':pclient') and docbasetype='ACF') and ad_language=to_char(':plang') and ad_client_id=to_char(':pclient'))), 'Cuenta Financiera') as document, 'C56E698100314ABBBBD3A89626CA551C' as tab_id, 'ACF' as docbasetype, FIN_BankStatement_id as record_id ,to_char(':process') as process from FIN_BankStatement where processed = 'Y' and COALESCE(posted,'') NOT IN ('Y','D') and 'Y'=(select max(isactive) from c_acctschema_table where ad_table_id='D4C23A17190649E7B78F55A05AF3438C' and ad_client_id=to_char(':pclient'))

cslrnp_sql_trx_notposted.name: M_Production
cslrnp_sql_trx_notposted.script: insert into cslrnp_data_notposted( cslrnp_data_notposted_id, ad_org_id, created, createdby, updated, updatedby, isactive, ad_client_id, documentno, dateacct, tablename, cbpid , grandtotal, description, documentno2, tab_id, docbasetype , record_id , processid ) select get_uuid() as recordid ,ad_org_id,now() as created , to_char('100') as createdby, now() as updated, to_char('100') as updatedby, to_char('Y') as isactive ,ad_client_id, TO_CHAR(documentno) AS DOCUMENTNO, movementdate, 'M_Production' as tablename, M_Production_ID as id, (0.00) as grandtotal, to_char(description) as description, coalesce(to_char((select printname from c_doctype_trl where c_doctype_id=(select min(c_doctype_id) from c_doctype where ad_client_id=to_char(':pclient') and docbasetype='MPL') and ad_language=to_char(':plang') and ad_client_id=to_char(':pclient'))), 'Producción LDM') as document, '319' as tab_id, 'MPL' as docbasetype, M_Production_ID as record_id ,to_char(':process') as process from M_Production where processed = 'Y' and COALESCE(posted,'') NOT IN ('Y','D') and 'Y'=(select max(isactive) from c_acctschema_table where ad_table_id='325' and ad_client_id=to_char(':pclient'))

cslrnp_sql_trx_notposted.name: m_inout not trx
cslrnp_sql_trx_notposted.script: insert into cslrnp_data_notposted( cslrnp_data_notposted_id, ad_org_id, created, createdby, updated, updatedby, isactive, ad_client_id, documentno, dateacct, tablename, cbpid , grandtotal, description, documentno2, tab_id, docbasetype , record_id , processid ) select get_uuid() as recordid ,ad_org_id,now() as created , to_char('100') as createdby, now() as updated, to_char('100') as updatedby, to_char('Y') as isactive ,ad_client_id, TO_CHAR(documentno) AS DOCUMENTNO, dateacct, 'M_InOut' as tablename, m_inout_id as id, 0 as GRANDTOTAL, to_char(description) as description, coalesce(to_char((select printname from c_doctype_trl where c_doctype_id=m_inout.c_doctype_id and ad_language=to_char(':plang') and ad_client_id=to_char(':pclient'))), 'Goods Receipts') as document, '296' as tab_id, (select docbasetype from c_doctype where c_doctype_id=m_inout.c_doctype_id) as docbasetype, m_inout_id as record_id ,to_char(':process') from m_inout where processed = 'Y' and COALESCE(posted,'') NOT IN ('Y','D') and issotrx = 'N' and 'Y'=(select max(isactive) from c_acctschema_table where ad_table_id='319' and ad_client_id=to_char(':pclient'))

cslrnp_sql_trx_notposted.name: sspr_settlement
cslrnp_sql_trx_notposted.script: insert into cslrnp_data_notposted( cslrnp_data_notposted_id, ad_org_id, created, createdby, updated, updatedby, isactive, ad_client_id, documentno, dateacct, tablename, cbpid , grandtotal, description, documentno2, tab_id, docbasetype , record_id , processid ) select get_uuid() as recordid ,ad_org_id,now() as created , to_char('100') as createdby, now() as updated, to_char('100') as updatedby, to_char('Y') as isactive ,ad_client_id, TO_CHAR(documentnonew) AS DOCUMENTNO, movementdate, 'sspr_settlement' as tablename, sspr_settlement_id as id, (0.00) as grandtotal, to_char(description) as description, coalesce(to_char((select printname from c_doctype_trl where c_doctype_id=(select min(c_doctype_id) from c_doctype where ad_client_id=to_char(':pclient') and docbasetype='LQF') and ad_language=to_char(':plang') and ad_client_id=to_char(':pclient'))), 'Liquidacion Final') as document, '7837F89A03FC4386AA01A2447ECBC848' as tab_id, 'LQF' as docbasetype, sspr_settlement_id as record_id ,to_char(':process') as process from sspr_settlement where processed = 'Y' and COALESCE(posted,'') NOT IN ('Y','D') and 'Y'=(select max(isactive) from c_acctschema_table where ad_table_id='DC962E28F8E2426DB8C0AD4BF8744B8D' and ad_client_id=to_char(':pclient'))

cslrnp_sql_trx_notposted.name: fin_payment not receipt
cslrnp_sql_trx_notposted.script: insert into cslrnp_data_notposted( cslrnp_data_notposted_id, ad_org_id, created, createdby, updated, updatedby, isactive, ad_client_id, documentno, dateacct, tablename, cbpid , grandtotal, description, documentno2, tab_id, docbasetype , record_id , processid ) select get_uuid() as recordid ,ad_org_id,now() as created , to_char('100') as createdby, now() as updated, to_char('100') as updatedby, to_char('Y') as isactive ,ad_client_id, TO_CHAR(documentno) AS DOCUMENTNO, paymentdate , 'C_Bpartner', c_bpartner_id as id, amount as GRANDTOTAL, to_char(description) as description, coalesce(to_char((select printname from c_doctype_trl where c_doctype_id=(select min(c_doctype_id) from c_doctype where ad_client_id=to_char(':pclient') and docbasetype='APP') and ad_language=to_char(':plang') and ad_client_id=to_char(':pclient'))), 'Payment Out') as document, 'F7A52FDAAA0346EFA07D53C125B40404' as tab_id, 'APP' as docbasetype, fin_payment_id as record_id ,to_char(':process') as process from fin_payment where processed = 'Y' and COALESCE(posted,'') NOT IN ('Y','D') and isreceipt='N' and status <> 'RPVOID' and 'Y'=(select max(isactive) from c_acctschema_table where ad_table_id='D1A97202E832470285C9B1EB026D54E2' and ad_client_id=to_char(':pclient'))

cslrnp_sql_trx_notposted.name: c_Settlement
cslrnp_sql_trx_notposted.script: insert into cslrnp_data_notposted( cslrnp_data_notposted_id, ad_org_id, created, createdby, updated, updatedby, isactive, ad_client_id, documentno, dateacct, tablename, cbpid , grandtotal, description, documentno2, tab_id, docbasetype , record_id , processid ) select get_uuid() as recordid ,ad_org_id,now() as created , to_char('100') as createdby, now() as updated, to_char('100') as updatedby, to_char('Y') as isactive ,ad_client_id, TO_CHAR(documentno) AS DOCUMENTNO, dateacct, 'C_Settlement' as tablename, C_Settlement_id as id, generatedamt, to_char(description) as description, coalesce(to_char((select printname from c_doctype_trl where c_doctype_id=s.c_doctype_id and ad_language=to_char(':plang') and ad_client_id=to_char(':pclient'))), 'Manual Settlements') as document, '800029' as tab_id, 'STM' as docbasetype, c_Settlement_id as record_id ,to_char(':process') as process from c_Settlement s where processed = 'Y' and COALESCE(posted,'') NOT IN ('Y','D') and settlementtype = 'I' and 'Y'=(select max(isactive) from c_acctschema_table where ad_table_id='800019' and ad_client_id=to_char(':pclient')) and exists (select 1 from c_debt_payment p where p.c_settlement_generate_id = s.c_settlement_id and p.isdirectposting='Y')

cslrnp_sql_trx_notposted.name: c_dp_management
cslrnp_sql_trx_notposted.script: insert into cslrnp_data_notposted( cslrnp_data_notposted_id, ad_org_id, created, createdby, updated, updatedby, isactive, ad_client_id, documentno, dateacct, tablename, cbpid , grandtotal, description, documentno2, tab_id, docbasetype , record_id , processid ) select get_uuid() as recordid ,ad_org_id,now() as created , to_char('100') as createdby, now() as updated, to_char('100') as updatedby, to_char('Y') as isactive ,ad_client_id, TO_CHAR(documentno) AS DOCUMENTNO, dateacct , 'C_DP_MANAGEMENT' as tablename, c_dp_management_id as id, 0 as GRANDTOTAL, to_char(description) as description, coalesce(to_char((select printname from c_doctype_trl where c_doctype_id=(select min(c_doctype_id) from c_doctype where ad_client_id=to_char(':pclient') and docbasetype='DPM') and ad_language=to_char(':plang') and ad_client_id=to_char(':pclient'))), 'Debt Payment Management') as document, '800209' as tab_id, 'DPM' as docbasetype, c_dp_management_id as record_id ,to_char(':process') as process from c_dp_management where processed = 'Y' and COALESCE(posted,'') NOT IN ('Y','D') and 'Y'=(select max(isactive) from c_acctschema_table where ad_table_id='800176' and ad_client_id=to_char(':pclient'))
